title: SR 15-15: Supervisory Letter SR 15-15 on Supervisory Concerns Related to Shareholder Protection Arrangements -- December 3, 2015
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 15-15 on Supervisory Concerns Related to Shareholder Protection Arrangements -- December 3, 2015
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 15-15
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to bank holding companies and savings and loan holding companies, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO ALL HOLDING COMPANIES SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE
bm25_text: SR 15-15 Supervisory Letter SR 15-15 on Supervisory Concerns Related to Shareholder Protection Arrangements -- December 3, 2015 This guidance applies to bank holding companies and savings and loan holding companies, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO ALL HOLDING COMPANIES SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE SUBJECT:
